text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all of Symboli Rudolf's races over, now is as
good a time as any to reflect on her
achievements.
choice_data_list:
I never dreamed you'd claim more than seven
crowns!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even I am astonished by the magnitude of what I
have accomplished.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But it is you who deserves the credit. None of this
would have been possible without your unfailing
guidance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. You have made me the
swiftest Umamusume there ever was.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I should thank my lucky stars that I chose you that
day... Or perhaps I should say that you chose me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, it is thanks to—wait, I see where this is going.
At this rate, we will be complimenting one
another all day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let us call it a draw and say that we were both responsible.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, I do believe we've earned ourselves
something of a reward, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Something worthy of commemorating this
monumental feat.
choice_data_list: What could live up to that?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Struggling for ideas? Well, truth be told, so am I.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Thinking of gifts for oneself isn't easy, is
it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But fortunately, we have a great deal of time. If
we put our heads together, I'm certain we'll
succeed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not least because time spent with you is as much
of a reward as any.
